jsonLd.title: MobiKwik is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at MobiKwik are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MobiKwik:
MobiKwik is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MobiKwik!
